query:
SELECT octaneCustomerId, octaneCustomerName, octaneServiceName, matchType, matchConfidence, matchNotes 
FROM octane_customer_links 
WHERE matchType IN ('none', 'unmatched') OR matchType IS NULL 
ORDER BY octaneCustomerName
LIMIT 30;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute SELECT octaneCustomerId, octaneCustomerName, octaneServiceName, matchType, matchConfidence, matchNotes 
FROM octane_customer_links 
WHERE matchType IN ('none', 'unmatched') OR matchType IS NULL

LIMIT 30;
